Journal.Title: Zhonghua liu xing bing xue za zhi = Zhonghua liuxingbingxue zazhi
Journal.ISOAbbreviation: Zhonghua Liu Xing Bing Xue Za Zhi

Article.ArticleTitle: [Current status, application scenarios, challenges, and recommendations for the development of medical artificial intelligence: a domestic and international perspective].

Abstract.AbstractText: Medical artificial intelligence (AI) is currently undergoing rapid development, with its technical framework evolving from symbolic reasoning to a new paradigm driven by deep learning and large language models. This article reviews the progression of AI technology, tracing its trajectory in the medical field under the policy support of countries such as China and the United States. It also analyzes the current development status of domestic and foreign large-scale models across three key areas: data, computing power, and algorithms. The article systematically outlines the advancements of AI in five major medical application scenarios: precision prevention and health management, precision diagnosis and treatment, precision drug development, precision infectious disease control, and precision medical education. Moreover, this article examines the critical challenges faced by current medical AI, including data quality, model interpretability and causality, hallucination control, fairness, overfitting, and safety verification, and offers strategies to address these concerns. In conclusion, this article provides a comprehensive perspective and strategic recommendations for the continued development of medical AI in our country.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Peking University Center for Public Health and Epidemic Preparedness & Response, Beijing 100191, China.
Department of Epidemiology and Biostatistics, School of Public Health, Peking Unversity, Beijing 100191, China.

MedlineJournalInfo.MedlineTA: Zhonghua Liu Xing Bing Xue Za Zhi

OtherAbstract.AbstractText: 医学人工智能（AI）正处于快速发展期，其技术体系已由符号主义推理转向深度学习与大语言模型主导的新范式。本文回顾了AI技术的发展历程，梳理了中美等国政策推动下AI在医学领域的演进路径，并从数据、算力、算法3个方面分析了中外大模型发展现状。本文系统总结了AI在五大医学应用场景中的进展，包括精准预防与精准健康管理、精准诊疗、精准药物发现、精准传染病防控、精准医学教育。同时，深入剖析了当前医学AI在数据质量、模型可解释性与因果性、幻觉控制、公平性与过拟合问题方面的关键挑战，并提出应对策略。旨在为我国医学AI的持续发展提供综合视野与策略建议。.
